title: Flower of Plus +
description: Adds a new flower to Minecraft called the Flower of Plus.
body:
## **_Adds a new flower to Minecraft called the Flower of Plus._**

![An image of the Flower of Plus.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4beadc28cbb9e07b7eccb8c51584f0df397029d.png)

 Allows for crafting Suspicious Stews with this new flower. _[The ability for potion effect giving will come soon]_

 Also generates naturally within all biomes in your world.

**_{ Specifically for Minecraft 1.20.1 using the Fabric Modloader _**NOTE:**_ Greater version compatability coming soon }_**
